summary: Full e2e testing of new Deposit-Request + Payment-Methods feature on FonAkis. Backend: 21/21 pytest cases PASSED (admin payment-methods CRUD, user PM listing, deposit request pending creation without crediting balance, admin approve credits balance + creates Para Yatırma tx, admin reject keeps balance unchanged, 400 on double-approve, 404 on invalid PM, sanity for /auth/me, /portfolio, /transactions, /cash/withdraw, /admin/transactions and /admin/stats.deposits.pending). Frontend (Playwright): admin login + sidebar entries (Yatırım Talepleri, Ödeme Yöntemleri), AdminPaymentMethods creates bank + crypto PMs with toggles, AdminDepositRequests page loads pending rows + approve flow works with browser confirm dialog, AdminDashboard shows 'Bekleyen Yatırım Talebi' pending alert, user (registered via API since UI register flow not fully exercised) opens /hesap-ozeti, opens deposit dialog with both bank+crypto tabs populated by admin-created PMs, submits 777 TRY deposit request, sees 'Beklemede' status under 'Yatırım Taleplerim', cash balance remains 0,00. After approval pending rows go from 1 to 0 and toast 'Onaylandı, bakiye yüklendi' shown. 9/10 Playwright assertions PASSED (token-injection localStorage-key probe failed but UI-login fallback succeeded — not a product bug).

issues: React a11y warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent (Radix Dialog) on AdminPaymentMethods edit dialog. Non-blocking but flagged.

action_items: Optional: add DialogDescription / aria-describedby to AdminPaymentMethods + AdminDepositRequests modals to silence Radix a11y warnings.
Optional: user Register page route is '/kayit' (not /register) — keep in mind for docs/links.
No functional bugs found — feature is production-ready for this iteration.
critical_code_review_comments: admin.py approve handler computes new_cash via u.get('cash_balance', 0) + amount but does not protect against concurrent double approve — protected by status==pending check, OK.
deposit_requests do not validate min_deposit setting (admin/settings.min_deposit exists but is not enforced on /api/cash/deposit). Consider enforcing if business requires.
/api/payment-methods (user) returns active=True items only — good. No leak of admin-only fields (notes excluded from user output). OK.
Reject handler stores rejection_reason='' when reason is None — fine, but UI requires reason input.

success_rate.frontend: 90% (9/10, the 1 fail is a test-script-side localStorage key probe, not a product issue)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@fonakis.com / admin1234. Regular users registered dynamically with TEST_ prefix via /api/auth/register.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed payment methods (bank+crypto) and TEST_-prefixed users + deposit requests. Cleanup test deletes the PMs at end. Test users and deposit_requests remain (harmless).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_deposit_flow.py is fully reusable as regression — run with `pytest backend/tests/test_deposit_flow.py -v`. AuthContext localStorage keys for FonAkis appear non-standard (fa_token/fa_user did not unlock /hesap-ozeti — UI login is required). User register route is '/kayit', login route is '/giris', user dashboard '/hesap-ozeti'. Admin routes under /admin/* including /admin/odeme-yontemleri and /admin/yatirim-talepleri. data-testids on new pages all verified working.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found this iteration.
